description:
Creates a dialog which is defined either in the mission's [[Description.ext|description.ext]], in the campaign's description.ext or in the global [[Resource.cpp/bin|resource.cpp]]. The given name has to be the class name used in one of these files. If another dialog is already opened, the desired dialog is created as a child dialog of the one already opened.

{{Feature|informative|By default, displays created with [[createDisplay]] are rendered on top of dialogs created with [[createDialog]]. If ''forceOnTop'' is set to [[true]], the dialog will be rendered on top of displays.}}
examples:
<sqf>
private _ok = createDialog "RscDisplayGame";
if (!_ok) then { hint "Dialog could not be opened!" };
</sqf>
name: createDialog

ret.desc: [[true]] when the dialog was created successfully

Item.desc: class name used in the description.ext, resource.cpp or config.cpp
Item.name: dialogName

Item.desc: class name used in the description.ext, resource.cpp or config.cpp
Item.name: dialogName

Item.desc: (Optional, default [[false]]) if [[true]], dialog will be rendered on top of displays
Item.name: forceOnTop
